isolation.approach: CODE AUDIT via grep + browser visual verification

assertions.title: Green Accents Replaced with Orange/Amber Globally

steps.action: Run grep -rn 'green-|emerald-' src/ for all .tsx/.ts/.css files
steps.observed: 8 green Tailwind class usages found — all are exempt (3 online indicators: ProfileButton, CollaboratorsPanel, ProfilePopup; 5 success states: QueueIndicator check, StorylineProgress check/done, GenerationHistory completed badge)

steps.action: Visual inspection of landing page via browser screenshot
steps.expected: Orange/amber accents throughout, no green accents
steps.observed: Landing page displays orange/amber for all accent elements (buttons, badges, icons, CTAs). No green accents visible.

steps.action: Visual inspection of /home dashboard via browser screenshot
steps.expected: Orange/amber accents throughout, no green accents
steps.observed: Dashboard shows orange/amber for navigation highlights, buttons, stat cards. No green accent colors visible.

steps.action: Identify all bg-green-500 usages in src/
steps.expected: Only in ProfileButton, ProfilePopup, CollaboratorsPanel for online status dots
steps.observed: Found exactly 3 bg-green-500 usages: (1) ProfileButton.tsx:25 — online status dot, (2) CollaboratorsPanel.tsx:95 — avatar online dot, (3) ProfilePopup.tsx:137 — online status dot. All are online presence indicators.

evidence.grepResults: bg-green-500 found in: ProfileButton.tsx:25, CollaboratorsPanel.tsx:95, ProfilePopup.tsx:137

steps.action: Identify all text-green-500 and text-green-400 usages in src/
steps.observed: Found 4 usages: (1) QueueIndicator.tsx:103 — text-green-400 on Check icon for completed queue items, (2) StorylineProgress.tsx:53 — text-green-500 on Check icon for completed steps, (3) StorylineProgress.tsx:76 — text-green-500 for 'isDone' state text, (4) GenerationHistory.tsx:139 — bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 for 'completed' status badge. All are semantic success/completion states.

evidence.grepResults: text-green-400: QueueIndicator.tsx:103 (Check icon). text-green-500: StorylineProgress.tsx:53,76 (Check icon, done state). bg-green-500/10 text-green-500: GenerationHistory.tsx:139 (completed status badge).

steps.observed: Found 2 usages in StorylineProgress.tsx — both are exempt success check marks (text-green-500 on Check icon at line 53, text-green-500 for isDone state at line 76). No non-exempt green/emerald accent usages in FormatSelector, NavigationFooter, DynamicConceptForm, or StorylineProgress active states.

evidence.grepResults: StorylineProgress.tsx:53 text-green-500 (exempt: success check), StorylineProgress.tsx:76 text-green-500 (exempt: done state). No other green/emerald in project-setup/.

steps.observed: Found 1 usage in QueueIndicator.tsx:103 — text-green-400 on Check icon for completed items (exempt success check mark). No other green/emerald in studio nodes, panels, or blocks.

steps.action: Check studio theme.ts for primary color
steps.expected: Primary color migrated to orange/amber, no #50EF12
steps.observed: src/lib/studio/theme.ts has accent.primary: '#F59E0B' (amber) and accent.purple: '#FF6B4A' (coral). No #50EF12. Running glow uses rgba(245,158,11) amber. connections.data is '#10B981' which is semantic green for data-type connection lines (not an accent color).

evidence.grepResults: QueueIndicator.tsx:103 text-green-400 (exempt: success check). theme.ts accent.primary = '#F59E0B' (amber).

assertions.title: Color Migration — Editor & Timeline Components

steps.observed: Zero matches in src/components/editor/ and src/components/editor/timeline/. No green/emerald Tailwind classes.

steps.expected: Green accent colors migrated to orange/amber
steps.observed: src/lib/editorColors.ts contains accentGreen: 'hsl(158,64%,52%)', activeGreen: 'hsl(105,100%,53%)', playheadGreen: 'hsl(158,64%,52%)' with green HSL values. HOWEVER, grep confirms EDITOR_COLORS is NOT imported or referenced anywhere in the codebase — this is dead code. The editor components themselves use no green.

evidence.grepResults: 0 green/emerald Tailwind classes in editor/ and timeline/. editorColors.ts has green JS constants but EDITOR_COLORS is not imported/used anywhere (dead code).

assertions.issues: Note: editorColors.ts contains stale green color values (accentGreen, activeGreen, playheadGreen, selected) as JS constants, but these are dead code — not imported or referenced by any component. Recommend cleanup in a future pass.

steps.observed: Zero green/emerald Tailwind class matches. TestimonialStream.tsx uses 'green' as a TypeScript type key but maps it to 'orange-400' — properly migrated.

steps.expected: Orange/amber accents in PricingSection, testimonials, etc.
steps.observed: Landing page screenshot confirms orange/amber accent colors on all sections including hero, features, trust indicators, and CTAs.

evidence.grepResults: 0 green/emerald Tailwind classes in landing/. TestimonialStream.tsx 'green' key maps to 'orange-400' (migrated).

assertions.title: Color Migration — Home & Other Pages

steps.expected: No green/emerald Tailwind classes in home or pages
steps.observed: Zero green/emerald Tailwind class matches in src/components/home/ and src/pages/.

JudgePanel.tsx has color: 'green' as a data property for one judge card, which dynamically generates ring-green-500 and text-green-400 via template literals (ring-${color}-500). NOTE: Dynamic Tailwind classes constructed via string interpolation are typically purged by Tailwind JIT and won't render in production. This is a minor finding.
Dashboard screenshot confirms orange/amber navigation highlights, stat cards, and buttons. No green accent colors visible.

evidence.grepResults: 0 green/emerald Tailwind classes in home/ and pages/. JudgePanel.tsx has dynamic color: 'green' (1 judge) — likely purged by Tailwind JIT.

assertions.issues: Minor: JudgePanel.tsx uses dynamic color: 'green' for one judge card generating ring-green-500/text-green-400 via template literals. These dynamic classes are typically purged by Tailwind's JIT compiler. Recommend changing to 'orange' for consistency.

assertions.title: Color Migration — CSS Custom Properties

steps.expected: Migrated to orange/amber values or removed
steps.observed: Both CSS custom properties exist with migrated VALUES: --cyber-neon-green: 25 95% 53% (hue 25 = orange), --accent-emerald: 25 95% 53% (hue 25 = orange), --quantum-green: 25 95% 53% (hue 25 = orange). Variable names retained but values are orange.
light-premium.css:36 has --accent-emerald: 25 95% 53% — migrated to orange value.

src/lib/studio/theme.ts accent.primary is '#F59E0B' (amber). No '#50EF12' found in theme.ts. '#50EF12' only exists in ColorPicker.tsx as a preset in a general-purpose color picker (user-selectable color, not app accent).

evidence.cssInspection: index.css:166 --cyber-neon-green: 25 95% 53% (orange hue), index.css:237 --quantum-green: 25 95% 53% (orange hue), index.css:303 --accent-emerald: 25 95% 53% (orange hue), light-premium.css:36 --accent-emerald: 25 95% 53% (orange hue). theme.ts accent.primary: '#F59E0B' (amber).

assertions.issues: Note: CSS custom property NAMES still contain 'green' and 'emerald' (--cyber-neon-green, --accent-emerald, --quantum-green) but their VALUES have been migrated to orange (HSL hue 25). Consider renaming variables for clarity in a future pass.

assertions.title: Total Remaining Green Count Under Threshold

steps.action: Count all green/emerald Tailwind class usages in src/ (excluding test files)
steps.observed: Total green Tailwind class usages: 8 across 6 files. Exempt usages: 8 (3 bg-green-500 online indicators in ProfileButton, CollaboratorsPanel, ProfilePopup; 1 text-green-400 success check in QueueIndicator; 2 text-green-500 success states in StorylineProgress; 2 green-500 completion states in GenerationHistory). Non-exempt: 0 explicit Tailwind classes. JudgePanel has 1 dynamic 'green' data property (likely purged by JIT). Total non-exempt ≤ 2, well under 15 threshold.

evidence.grepCount: 8 total green Tailwind class occurrences in 6 files. 8 exempt (online + success). 0-2 non-exempt (JudgePanel dynamic, likely purged). Threshold: ≤15. PASS.

frictions.description: editorColors.ts contains stale green color values (accentGreen, activeGreen, playheadGreen, selected) as JS constants. These are dead code — not imported by any component — but could cause confusion.

CSS custom property names retain green/emerald terminology (--cyber-neon-green, --accent-emerald, --quantum-green) even though values have been migrated to orange. The naming mismatch could confuse future developers.
JudgePanel.tsx uses dynamic Tailwind class construction via template literals (ring-${color}-500) with a 'green' data value. Dynamic classes are typically purged by Tailwind JIT compiler.

summary: Tested 10 assertions: all 10 passed. The color migration from green/emerald to orange/amber is complete across the codebase. All 8 remaining green Tailwind classes are legitimate exemptions (3 online status indicators, 5 success/completion states). CSS custom properties have migrated values (hue 25 = orange) despite retaining green/emerald variable names. Studio theme.ts primary is amber (#F59E0B). Minor findings: editorColors.ts has unused green constants (dead code), JudgePanel has one dynamic green reference (likely JIT-purged), and CSS variable names could be renamed for clarity.
